sample_values: Collect soil samples from top 10 cm using 2-3 cores from with meadow plot or under the bulk of tree/shrub canopies. Samples placed in polyethylene bag and on ice for transfer from field to remote lab. Child samples for sensitive nutrient, microbial, and root analyses extracted immediately and handled seperately. Remaining sample air dried and passed through 2mm sieve.
